title: Fiutiu Resouces
description:
The FIUTIU RP resource pack is used for the FIUTIU RP mod packs and SMP server.

It includes Custom item textures in use of optifine or CIT, as well as wing textures.
body:
The FIUTIU RP resource pack is used for the FIUTIU RP mod packs and SMP server.

It includes Custom item textures in use of optifine or CIT, as well as wing textures.
